data.title: $7.3M stolen from 1,400 BNB Chain pools via DxSale exploit, linked to backdoor vulnerabilities.
data.description: An exploit occurred on DxSale's liquidity locker on the BNB Chain, resulting in $7.3 million being drained from 1,400 pools. The incident has raised concerns among analysts who have highlighted potential backdoor vulnerabilities as the root cause. Seeking more details on this incident is advised.

data.title: Atlantic Petroleum – Condensed Consolidated Interim Report – 1st Quarter 2026
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Tórshavn, Faroe Islands, P/F Atlantic Petroleum (NASDAQ Copenhagen: ATLA DKK) disclosed its first-quarter results for 2026. Investors are advised to review this announcement alongside Atlantic Petroleum’s Condensed Consolidated Interim Report available on the company’s website.

data.title: MD Hyperbaric expands national footprint to Texas, Nevada and New York
data.description: In a bid to broaden access to evidence-based recovery and healing solutions, MD Hyperbaric, the primary provider of medical-grade hyperbaric oxygen therapy in the US, has launched new centers in San Antonio, Las Vegas, and Rochester. This expansion signifies a strategic move to reach more individuals seeking advanced medical treatments. The New York-based company announced this development on May 29, 2026. The establishment of these new centers aims to cater to a wider audience with specific therapeutic needs, further solidifying MD Hyperbaric's position as a leader in the field.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- iFoodDS/
data.description: Markem-Imaje and iFoodDS have recently collaborated to streamline FSMA 204 Traceability Compliance for food suppliers. The partnership was announced on 28th May 2026 by iFoodDS through PR Newswire. The adjustment in the news release provides important updates for stakeholders. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency in meeting FSMA 204 standards and simplifying traceability processes. This initiative is expected to benefit a significant number of food suppliers and manufacturers, helping them navigate compliance requirements more effectively.

data.title: Why GM Stock Is Rising Even Though The Car Industry Is Shrinking
data.description: Following a strong earnings report, General Motors saw its stock price soar as a couple of analysts increased their price targets for the company. Despite a shrinking car industry, GM's stock is on the rise, indicative of investor confidence in the company's performance. The reasons behind the stock's uptick lie in the impressive financial results revealed in the earnings report. The price targets set by analysts reflect a positive outlook for GM's future growth potential, demonstrating optimism within the investment community regarding the company's trajectory.

data.title: Gap Inc. Investigation Initiated: SueWallSt Investigates the Officers and Directors of Gap Inc. (GAP)
data.description: In the first quarter, Gap Inc. experienced a 1% increase in revenue, reaching $3.5 billion, below the expectations of Wall Street analysts. Additionally, Old Navy's comparable sales only rose by 1%, significantly lower than the projected 3%. As a result, Gap Inc.'s shares plummeted by more than 15% in just one trading session. This occurred on May 29, 2026, in New York. Investors holding Gap Inc. (NYSE:...) stocks were impacted by this downturn.

data.title: PHARMACISTS MUTUAL ANNOUNCES FELIX GALLAGHER AS NEW CHAIR OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
data.description: In Algona, Iowa on May 29, 2026, Pharmacists Mutual Insurance Group revealed the selection of Felix Gallagher, PharmD, as the new Chair of its Board of Directors. Gallagher takes over from Sue Sutter, who held the position since 2024 and completes a 21-year tenure.

data.title: First Class Completes Vaughn's New Enhanced Air Traffic Collegiate Training Initiative with 100% Pass Rate
data.description: In response to the shortage of air traffic controllers, Vaughn College in Flushing, New York, was authorized by the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) in April 2025 to launch a training program. This initiative aims to alleviate the shortage by providing an accelerated employment path. This program seeks to address the pressing need by training individuals to take on these crucial roles. The approval by the FAA underscores the importance of this program in tackling the shortage in the industry. It highlights the commitment of Vaughn College to contribute to addressing this issue effectively. This effort is crucial as the demand for air traffic controllers continues to rise, and the program is set to train a significant number of individuals to meet this demand.

data.title: Clarinda Regional Health Center Provides Notice of Data Incident
data.description: In Clarinda, Iowa, on May 29, 2026, Clarinda Regional Health Center (Clarinda) reported a data breach impacting the privacy of specific individuals’ information. Those potentially affected were informed of the incident and offered assistance...

data.title: Researchers From NYU Langone Health's Perlmutter Cancer Center Present Latest Findings at 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: On May 29, 2026, specialists from NYU Langone Health's Perlmutter Cancer Center, recognized as a National Cancer Institute–designated Comprehensive Cancer Center, share their most recent clinical discoveries and studies at the 2026 Annual Meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO).

data.title: Clean Energy Technologies Receives Notice of Deficiency from Nasdaq
data.description: On May 26, 2026, Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CETY), a provider of clean energy solutions, received a notification from Nasdaq stating that they are not in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) as they have not submitted their Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. This notification highlights the Company's delay in meeting the required filing deadline.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq, S&P 500 Score Highs As Oil Falls Below $90 (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase as oil prices continued to drop. Both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 also reached new highs amidst this trend. Oil prices fell below the $90 mark, contributing to the positive performance in the stock market on Wednesday. This information was covered in live reporting by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
data.description: Stock futures declined following a rise in oil prices, with the Dow Jones falling. Nvidia stock showed volatility despite impressive earnings. SpaceX, led by Elon Musk, released its IPO filing. Oil prices surpassed $100, impacting market sentiment. Walmart shares also experienced a decline. SpaceX's IPO filing has generated significant interest among investors.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Iran Delay Saves Dow, But Sandisk, Bloom Energy, AI Leaders Sell Off
data.description: The President revealed that he postponed a scheduled assault on Iran, which had a significant impact on the market. Despite this, major companies like Sandisk and Bloom Energy, as well as other leaders in the field of artificial intelligence, experienced a decline. The Dow Jones Futures were influenced by these events, leading to a decrease in stock prices.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises, Nasdaq Cuts Loss As Trump Delays Iran Attack; Nvidia Falls (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a varied close as major indexes recorded mixed results. The Dow Jones Industrial Average finished the day with gains, while the Nasdaq experienced cuts in losses. This comes as President Trump's decision to delay an attack on Iran influenced market dynamics. Notably, Nvidia's stock faced a decline during this trading session. The latest coverage delves into these movements within the market landscape.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. Releases Results For the Three and Nine Months Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: On May 29, 2026, a Canadian venture capital firm named ThreeD Capital Inc. disclosed its unaudited results for the three and nine months up to March 31, 2026. The firm, traded as CSE:IDK / OTCQB:IDKFF, specializes in making strategic investments in companies within the junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors.
The S&P Hit A Record While 8 Of 11 Sectors Fell

data.title: Immix Biopharma Announces Pricing of $150 Million Underwritten Offering of Common Stock
data.description: On May 21, 2026, Immix Biopharma, Inc. revealed the pricing for its underwritten registered offering of 16,778,524 shares of common stock at $8.94 per share. The anticipated gross proceeds for Immix from this offering total around $150 million, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The closure of this offering is scheduled for around May 22, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

data.title: Instant Reaction: Mortgage Rates, August 15, 2024
data.description: In a recent update on August 15, 2024, the 30-year fixed mortgage rate provided by Freddie Mac remained stable at 6.49%, showing a marginal increase from the previous week's rate of 6.47%. This news comes within the domain of Mortgages & Home Financing, with Jessica Lautz contributing to the coverage.

data.title: Autolus Therapeutics Announces Initiative to Support Operational Efficiency and Cost Reduction
data.description: Autolus revealed a new strategic plan aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and cutting operating costs.
